name: trade_policy_recall_notice_arrives_stonehaven_jus_mer
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Trade Policy, the situation tagged internally around trade policy recall notice arrives stonehaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as justice against mercy; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Inez Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Inez Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Trade Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Chen
agents.identity: I am Elena Chen, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Trade Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Inez Ishikawa must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Inez Ishikawa do?
